descFull: EU AI Act compliance proxy for AI systems. Drop-in HTTP proxy that monitors every AI interaction for regulatory risks, logs to a tamper-proof audit trail, and generates legal-grade PDF reports. 143 rules across 8 Annex III domains. Self-hosted, open-core
